figmaSyncStatus.details: Figma MCP / Code Connect are optional; leave optional artifact fields out when no handoff exists.

notes: Optional. These names match the Phase 3/4/5 artifact contract exactly.
Only copy artifactFieldsWhenAvailable into phase-3-artifact.json after filling real non-placeholder values.
Required before copying: designTokenSource.path, designTokenExportPath, and a 64-character designTokenHash.
Add designTokenSource.format or designTokenSource.figmaFileUrl only when those values are real and non-empty.
Do not seal failed Figma sync evidence; omit optional Figma fields or fix the sync/export first.
If no Figma/design-token handoff exists, omit these optional fields from the sealed phase artifact.
Do not store Figma access tokens, OAuth credentials, or private file dumps here.
